data.title: Vestmark and T. Rowe Price partner to launch "Custom Premier," a personalized model portfolio solution for RIAs in Wakefield, Mass.
data.description: A new program called Custom Premier has been introduced in Wakefield, Massachusetts aiming to cater to the changing requirements of advisors. This program allows advisors to offer personalized investment strategies on a larger scale.

BLACKROCK'S RICK RIEDER SURGES IN FED CHAIR BETTING Rick Rieder has been climbing fast in prediction markets, now at 32% and closing the gap with frontrunner Kevin Warsh. His sharp rise in recent weeks suggests growing confidence among traders that he could emerge as Trump’s

data.title: Wealth.com partners with LPL Financial, providing estate planning to 32,000+ advisors. Business integration aims to enhance wealth management.
data.description: Wealth.com, a top estate planning platform for financial advisors, has revealed a strategic partnership with LPL Financial, a prominent wealth management firm in the US. Through this collaboration, Wealth.com will now be accessible to LPL's advisors and wealth planning teams. This move involves a direct integration, allowing LPL's Advanced Planning Team to effectively utilize the services provided by Wealth.com. This partnership marks a significant development in the industry, combining the expertise of Wealth.com in estate planning with LPL's extensive reach in wealth management.

data.title: Small businesses cautiously optimistic for 2026 despite challenges, survey shows. "None of the above" top choice for 39%.
data.description: In Dallas, there is a sense of caution among small business owners for the year 2026, as per recent data from Thryv® (NASDAQ: THRY). A survey conducted by the SMB marketing platform in mid-December 2025 revealed that entrepreneurs are facing challenges leading to subdued optimism. When asked about factors they were hopeful about in their business, such as the economy, competitive advantages, technological advancements like AI, and recruitment capacities, a high proportion (39 percent) chose "none of the above." However, there were some positive indicators with nearly 30 percent of SMBs expressing optimism.

data.title: TSG launches Executive Dashboard for payments benchmarking, offers clear view of portfolio performance. #Analytics #Payments
data.description: A firm called The Strawhecker Group (TSG) in Omaha, Nebraska has unveiled its Executive Dashboard, an addition to its Acquiring Industry Metrics (AIM) platform. TSG is known globally for its analytics and solutions in the payments sector. The Executive Dashboard offers payment companies a quick and user-friendly overview of their portfolio performance, highlighting revenue-affecting trends and changes. This tool is utilized by a wide range of organizations.

data.title: Boxlight introduces FrontRow Symphony™, a new campus communication platform to enhance collaboration. #edtech #innovation.
data.description: In Duluth, Georgia, Boxlight Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as BOXL, has introduced FrontRow Symphony™, a cutting-edge campus communication platform. Boxlight is celebrated globally for its innovative solutions that improve communication and collaboration in educational settings and businesses. FrontRow Symphony™ is part of Boxlight's initiative to update and consolidate communication systems across schools. This platform, based on modern IP standards, is the next evolution in AVPA technology.

data.title: 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT) launches 8x8 Secure Pay globally for compliant payments across digital channels.
data.description: A company based in Campbell, California, known as 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT), has recently broadened the international reach of 8x8 Secure Pay.

data.title: Cognizin® citicoline named "Functional Ingredient to Watch in 2026" by Mintel & Black Swan Data, showcasing explosive growth in brain health sector. Independent recognition highlights Cognizin®'s leadership in cognitive performance.
data.description: New York, January 22, 2026 - Kyowa Hakko USA revealed today that their product Cognizin® (citicoline), produced by Kyowa Hakko Bio Co., has received independent recognition as a leading cognitive performance enhancer. This underscores Cognizin®'s position as a science-backed leader in the field. The recognition emphasizes the effectiveness of Cognizin® in enhancing cognitive abilities.

data.title: Pokeworks is adding four new locations in Long Island and Manhattan to expand its reach in New York.
data.description: A popular premium poke brand, Pokeworks, has joined forces with seasoned operators to drive further expansion in New York City. As of January 22, 2026, the leading fast-casual poke brand has announced a partnership with two new franchise owners as part of its growth strategy. This move underscores Pokeworks' commitment to establishing a strong presence in the Big Apple market.

data.title: Shoppers demand faster, easier holiday returns, with 55% planning to make a return; 21% want AI for support.
data.description: In Toronto, AI-native customer experience company Ada announced survey results showing that retail returns during the busy holiday season are crucial moments in the customer journey. The survey revealed that 55% of shoppers have made or intend to make returns post-holiday, while 21% reported they have or will make a return. This data underscores the significance of AI-powered support in handling returns efficiently. The survey highlights how ACX model can enhance the customer experience during this critical phase.

data.title: SLB (NYSE: SLB) set to announce EPS of $0.74 on 2026-01-23. Analysts optimistic on surpassing estimates. Shares trading at $48.52, up 14.84% past year. Analysts rate SLB as Buy.
data.description: Schlumberger (NYSE: SLB) will announce its quarterly earnings on January 23, 2026. Analysts predict an EPS of $0.74, with investors hoping for surpassing estimates. In the last quarter, EPS beat by $0.02, resulting in a 0.0% share price drop. Schlumberger’s recent share price was $48.52, up by 14.84% in a year. Analysts have given it a consensus Buy rating with an average one-year price target. Future projections heavily impact stock prices. This quarter's announcement is eagerly anticipated for potential positive guidance for the next quarter.

data.title: Xsolla partners with Paidy in Japan, offering BNPL with 15M app downloads for game developers, expanding payment options.
data.description: Xsolla, a worldwide video game commerce company supporting developers in launching, expanding, and monetizing their games, has revealed an expansion in Japan's payment solutions. The company has partnered with Paidy, a prominent Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) service in Japan. Through Xsolla Pay Station, game developers and publishers can incorporate this new integration to provide secure, flexible, and recognizable checkout experiences for Japanese players. Notably, this integration does not necessitate credit card information, benefitting millions of players in Japan.

data.title: Florida Nonprofit Alliance and TECO organize 2nd annual Florida Nonprofit Day event in Tallahassee on Feb 10-11, 2026.
data.description: A significant event named Florida Nonprofit Day is being organized in Tallahassee, Fla., on February 10-11, 2026. The event is the second annual collaboration between the Florida Nonprofit Alliance and TECO.

data.title: Fiber Broadband Association highlights importance of fiber in AI and quantum computing, crucial for meeting communication demands.
data.description: In a recent release, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) unveiled a paper titled "Infrastructure Foundations for AI and Quantum Computing" in Washington. The document delves into the essential contribution of fiber in the upcoming phase of digital evolution. With artificial intelligence (AI) and quantum computing transitioning from theoretical to practical application, they are significantly stretching communication networks, necessitating the capabilities that only fiber broadband can provide. The paper emphasizes the significance of tangible investments in preparing for quantum networks.

data.title: Curant Rare partners with Cencora for rare drug commercialization. Aims to aid pharmaceutical companies in overcoming regulatory hurdles.
data.description: In Atlanta today, Curant Rare revealed a new partnership with Cencora, a global pharmaceutical solutions firm, to assist pharmaceutical companies in the development of rare disease therapies. This collaboration seeks to offer an integrated solution to support the commercialization of such products. Rare disease therapies encounter distinctive obstacles such as intricate regulatory processes and barriers to access. Leveraging Cencora’s pharmaceutical logistics services and commercial expertise, this collaboration aims to address these challenges and provide comprehensive support.

data.title: Tetra Tech buys Halvik Corp, enhancing services in data analytics, systems modernization, and cybersecurity for US agencies.
data.description: In Pasadena, California, Tetra Tech, Inc., a prominent provider of consulting and engineering services in water, environment, and sustainable infrastructure, has disclosed its acquisition of Halvik Corp (Halvik). Halvik specializes in advisory consulting services, particularly in advanced data analytics, systems modernization, and cybersecurity for U.S. defense and civilian agencies. Tetra Tech, listed on NASDAQ as TTEK, aims to enhance its high-end analytics and digital solutions through this acquisition. This strategic move signifies Tetra Tech's commitment to expanding its services in the advisory sector to cater to the growing needs of defense and civilian agencies.

data.title: Advanced Process Solutions (APS) in Blue Ridge, Texas, adds Ken Stone as Vice President of Business Development, boosting executive team.
data.description: In Blue Ridge, Texas on January 22, 2026, PRNewswire reported that Advanced Process Solutions (APS), a top player in precision manufacturing and process technology solutions for the semiconductor, electronics, and industrial sectors, welcomed Ken Stone, an industry veteran, to their team.

data.title: Sales Focus Inc. rebrands with new tagline "Trusted Process. Proven Results" to reflect growth services - Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: Sales Focus Inc. (SFI), a sales outsourcing pioneer, unveiled its revamped brand identity on Jan. 22, 2026, in Charleston, South Carolina. The company introduced a new tagline, "Trusted Process. Proven Results." The updated branding showcases SFI's ongoing transformation and commitment to delivering successful outcomes.
